classes.queryability: primary operator surfaces remain queryable from current rows
classes.export_behavior: prefer projection and event mirrors; never depend on remote mirrors for authority

classes.compaction: compact by generation while keeping latest summary lineage
classes.queryability: operator summaries remain queryable after compaction
classes.export_behavior: eligible for snapshot and projection export

classes.compaction: archive or expire outside the active window
classes.queryability: primary surfaces must not depend on retained forensic depth
classes.export_behavior: prefer event_audit export before local expiry

classes.queryability: not queryable in authoritative operator surfaces
